en_title: 'My Heart's With All of You' — John Romero Says id Software Has 'Done a Great Job' Moving the Studio's Legacy Forward and Hopes Someone Is Working to Preserve It All Amid Xbox Layoffs
cn_title: John Romero声援XBOX裁员中的id Software员工
subtitle: 希望遗产被保存
opus_summary: id Software联合创始人John Romero谈及XBOX裁员波及这家老牌工作室，称团队很好地延续了遗产，并呼吁保护其历史资料。

paragraphs.en: John Romero has commented on the layoffs that have impacted Microsoft-owned id Software as part of sweeping cuts to the Xbox business.
paragraphs.cn: John Romero就微软旗下id Software受到XBOX业务大规模裁员影响一事发表了看法。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Microsoft gaming boss Asha Sharma announced , with 1,600 staff let go immediately, and another 1,600 staff to follow over the course of the current financial year. As part of the restructure, four studios are leaving Xbox to new management, and one is now in consultation over its future.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，微软游戏业务负责人Asha Sharma宣布裁员，1600名员工立即离职，另有1600名员工将在本财年内陆续离职。作为重组的一部分，四家工作室将离开XBOX并交由新的管理方，另有一家工作室正在就未来进行磋商。

paragraphs.en: ZeniMax Media, which operates Bethesda, was hit hard by the layoffs. ZeniMax Online Studios has suffered significant cuts, forcing the remaining developers of The Elder Scrolls Online to rethink future content . And id Software is also heavily affected.
paragraphs.cn: 运营贝塞斯达的ZeniMax Media在这轮裁员中受到重创。ZeniMax Online Studios遭遇大幅裁员，迫使《上古卷轴OL》剩余开发者重新思考未来内容。id Software同样受到严重影响。

paragraphs.en: The developer of Doom has lost 95 staff, according to former Bethesda Studios project lead Jeff Gardiner. Among them is principal character artist Denzil O’Neill, who worked on Doom The Dark Ages, Doom Eternal, and Doom over the course of 12 years at the studio. The Doom The Dark Ages expansion comes out this week.
paragraphs.cn: 据前贝塞斯达工作室项目负责人Jeff Gardiner称，这家《毁灭战士》开发商裁掉了95名员工。其中包括首席角色艺术家Denzil O’Neill，他在id Software工作12年，参与过《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》、《毁灭战士：永恒》和《毁灭战士》。《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》的扩展内容将于本周推出。

paragraphs.en: Romero, co-founder of id Software and the designer of Doom, Wolfenstein 3D, and Quake, took to social media to offer affected staff his support, and to call on the studio’s recent legacy to be preserved.
paragraphs.cn: Romero是id Software联合创始人，也是《毁灭战士》、《德军总部3D》和《雷神之锤》的设计师。他在社交媒体上向受影响员工表达支持，并呼吁保存这家工作室近年的遗产。

paragraphs.en: “I’m so sorry for everyone at id Software affected by these layoffs,” Romero tweeted.
paragraphs.cn: Romero发文说：「我为id Software所有受到这轮裁员影响的人感到难过。」

paragraphs.en: “I know what it feels like to leave id while id goes on. It’s a strange and painful thing to step away from a place that holds so much of your work, friendships and history.”
paragraphs.cn: 他写道：「我知道在id仍继续前进时离开id是什么感受。从一个承载了你大量工作、友谊和历史的地方离开，是一件奇怪又痛苦的事。」

paragraphs.en: “The people at id have done a great job moving that legacy forward. DOOM, Quake, and Wolfenstein are not easy names to carry on, especially in today’s industry. The last few games showed real care, skill and respect for what those worlds mean to people.”
paragraphs.cn: Romero继续说：「id的人们在推进这份遗产方面做得非常好。《毁灭战士》、《雷神之锤》和《德军总部》都不是容易延续的名字，尤其是在今天这个行业里。最近几款游戏展现了真正的用心、技艺，以及对这些世界在人们心中意义的尊重。」

paragraphs.en: “A note on digital preservation: id's history is critically important to the history of games. I’ve preserved id’s complete early history from our start at Softdisk through to August 6, 1996, including materials and assets that, as far as I know, id itself no longer has. I hope someone is doing the same for the company’s ongoing legacy (the work, code, assets, stories and the people behind them).”
paragraphs.cn: 他还写道：「关于数字保存：id的历史对游戏史至关重要。我已经保存了id从Softdisk时期开始到1996年8月6日为止完整的早期历史，其中包括据我所知连id自己都已不再拥有的材料和资产。我希望也有人在为公司仍在延续的遗产做同样的事，包括作品、代码、资产、故事以及背后的人。」

paragraphs.en: “I’m thinking of everyone at id today, and everyone else affected by yesterday’s layoffs. Romero Games was there a year ago. I know how devastating it is, and my heart's with all of you.”
paragraphs.cn: Romero最后说：「我今天牵挂着id的每一个人，也牵挂着所有受到昨天裁员影响的人。Romero Games一年前也经历过这种事。我知道这有多么毁灭性，我的心与你们所有人同在。」

paragraphs.en: That’s a reference to last year’s cancelation of Romero Games’ shooter after Microsoft reportedly pulled funding as part of layoffs in July 2025. This was the round of layoffs that included the cancelation of Rare’s Everwild and The Initiative’s Perfect Dark reboot.
paragraphs.cn: 这是在指去年Romero Games射击游戏被取消一事。据报道，微软在2025年7月裁员期间撤回了资金。那一轮裁员还包括Rare的《Everwild》和The Initiative的《完美黑暗》重启版被取消。

paragraphs.en: Romero Games did not close, and the Romeros assured fans they were “evaluating opportunities” from publishers that had been in touch since the funding issues were announced, but very little was known about the game other than it was a first-person shooter.
paragraphs.cn: Romero Games并未关闭。Romero夫妇向粉丝保证，自资金问题公布以来，他们一直在「评估」联系过来的发行商机会。不过，外界对这款游戏几乎一无所知，只知道它是一款第一人称射击游戏。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, the future of id Software remains unclear. MachineGames has survived the cull, with a new Wolfenstein game pretty much an open secret at this point. Could what remains of id Software be put to work supporting its development, or perhaps helping another studio make a new Fallout game?
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，id Software的未来仍不明朗。MachineGames在裁员中保留下来，而新的《德军总部》游戏如今几乎已经是公开秘密。id Software剩余团队是否会被安排去支援该项目开发，或者帮助其他工作室制作新的《辐射》游戏？

paragraphs.en: Sharma has made it clear that Xbox wants to double down on its biggest franchises. Bethesda boss Jill Braff has told staff much the same. Without naming games, Braff said “to best position Bethesda for future growth, we are shifting from a planning model primarily centered on what's next for each independent studio to one that focuses on our strongest franchises and determining the content roadmap that best serves our players and Bethesda as a whole.”
paragraphs.cn: Sharma已经明确表示，XBOX希望加倍押注最大型的系列。贝塞斯达负责人Jill Braff也向员工传达了类似信息。Braff没有点名具体游戏，但她表示：「为了让贝塞斯达更好地面向未来增长，我们正在从主要围绕各个独立工作室下一步做什么的规划模式，转向聚焦我们最强系列，并确定最能服务玩家和整个贝塞斯达的内容路线图。」

paragraphs.en: “From there, we’ll align the right talent, technology, and resources across the organization to deliver on those priorities,” Braff added. Bloomberg reported that Bethesda will continue to work on Wolfenstein, Doom, and Quake alongside The Elder Scrolls and Fallout.
paragraphs.cn: Braff补充说：「在此基础上，我们会在整个组织内协调合适的人才、技术和资源，以交付这些优先事项。」彭博社报道称，贝塞斯达将继续开发《德军总部》、《毁灭战士》和《雷神之锤》，同时也会推进《上古卷轴》和《辐射》。
